Home / Services / Door Installation

Door Installation

Secure and stylish door installation services for Indianapolis homes.

Weatherguard Windows & Doors provides professional door installation services throughout Indianapolis and the surrounding communities. Whether you're looking to upgrade your front entry, replace a patio door, or install a new storm door, our experienced team has the expertise to handle any project. We offer a wide selection of door styles and materials, including fiberglass, steel, wood, and composite, ensuring that you find the perfect fit for your home's aesthetic and security needs.

Our door installation process begins with a thorough assessment of your existing door and frame. We then carefully remove the old door, prepare the opening, and install your new door with precision and attention to detail. We ensure a proper fit and alignment, preventing drafts and water leaks. We also install high-quality hardware and weatherstripping to maximize security and energy efficiency. We understand the importance of a secure and functional door, especially in Indianapolis, where extreme weather conditions can take a toll.

We're committed to providing our customers with exceptional service and quality workmanship. That's why we back our door installations with comprehensive warranties and responsive customer support. From the initial consultation to the final cleanup, we'll work closely with you to ensure your complete satisfaction. Trust Weatherguard Windows & Doors to enhance the security, beauty, and value of your Indianapolis home with our professional door installation services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and door selection
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise measurements and ordering
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional door installation
  4. 04 Step 4: Quality inspection and cleanup

Benefits

  • Enhanced home security
  • Improved energy efficiency
  • Increased curb appeal
  • Added home value

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of door is best for security?

Steel doors are generally considered the most secure option for exterior doors. They are resistant to forced entry and can withstand harsh weather conditions.

How often should I replace my exterior doors?

Exterior doors typically last 15-30 years, depending on the material and maintenance. If your door is damaged, warped, or drafty, it may be time for a replacement.

Do you install storm doors?

Yes, we install storm doors to provide an extra layer of protection against the elements. Storm doors can also improve energy efficiency and ventilation.
